weather_report:
Subiaco settles into a clear, lucid night: the sky swept clean to a velvet dark, stars crisp at the edges, the air unhurried. It isn’t sunny now, of course; the UV is effectively absent, and the clarity is the sort that makes distant rooftops look freshly cut. The evening forecast held to pure blue right into late night, and the mood outdoors is calm and uncomplicated.

Dress lightly but with a nod to the hour: a soft sweater or light jacket, something you can tuck under your arm if you warm up on a short stroll. If you’re up early, this same clarity will likely flip at dawn into brisk, bright sunshine, with the UV climbing quickly; sunglasses, a hat, and a touch of sunscreen will serve you well. For now, it’s a good time to walk the quieter streets, sort tomorrow’s list at the kitchen table, or set coffee things out so morning can start gently before the sun gets earnest.
